---
title: "SAS and SPSS"
---


Dedicated to show some commands for these two pacakges .... 


## SAS

```{r, eval =FALSE, echo=TRUE}
PROC MEANS DATA=&lu10h;
```


```{r, eval =FALSE, echo=TRUE}
FILENAME output "&mypdf/graphtestsas.png";
GOPTIONS RESET=ALL DEVICE=PNG GSFNAME=output GSFMODE=REPLACE;
PROC GCHART data=&lu10p;
VBAR age / TYPE=percent;
RUN;
```



## SPSS 

```{r, eval =FALSE, echo=TRUE}
get file = lu10h
```


```{r, eval =FALSE, echo=TRUE}
GET FILE = lu10p
GRAPH /BAR(SIMPLE)=relation BY edyrs.
OUTPUT EXPORT /JPG DOCUMENTFILE="mypdf\graphtestspss.jpg
```
